name: Denim Jacket
description: A classic fit denim jacket made from high-quality, durable cotton. Perfect for a casual look.
careInstructions: Machine wash cold with like colors. Do not bleach. Tumble dry low. Iron on low heat if needed.

name: Silk Blouse
description: An elegant silk blouse perfect for formal occasions. Available in various colors.
careInstructions: Dry clean only to maintain the fabric's integrity and sheen.

name: Cotton T-shirt
description: A comfortable and breathable cotton t-shirt, a staple for any wardrobe.
careInstructions: Machine wash warm. Do not use chlorine bleach. Tumble dry medium. Can be ironed on high heat.

name: Wool Scarf
description: A warm and soft wool scarf, perfect for cold weather. Available in multiple patterns.
careInstructions: Hand wash with cold water. Lay flat to dry. Do not wring or twist.

name: Leather Belt
description: A genuine leather belt with a polished metal buckle. Durable and stylish.
careInstructions: Wipe with a damp cloth. Use a leather conditioner periodically. Do not submerge in water.

name: Chino Trousers
description: Slim-fit chino trousers made from a stretch cotton blend for comfort and style.
careInstructions: Machine wash cold. Tumble dry low. Iron on medium heat.

name: A-Line Skirt
description: A flowy A-line skirt with a floral pattern, perfect for a sunny day.
careInstructions: Machine wash on delicate cycle. Hang to dry. Do not iron directly on the print.

name: Hooded Sweatshirt
description: A cozy, fleece-lined hooded sweatshirt with a minimalist design.
careInstructions: Machine wash inside out with cold water. Tumble dry low.

name: Leather Handbag
description: A premium genuine leather handbag with multiple compartments and a detachable strap.
careInstructions: Clean with a dry cloth. Use leather protector spray. Store in a dust bag.

name: High-Waisted Jeans
description: Flattering high-waisted jeans with a straight leg cut, made from durable denim.
careInstructions: Machine wash cold inside out. Do not bleach. Air dry to preserve color.

name: Polo Shirt
description: A classic polo shirt made from pique cotton. Ideal for a smart-casual look.
careInstructions: Machine wash cold. Hang to dry. Do not tumble dry.

name: Knitted Sweater
description: A soft, chunky knit sweater made from a wool and cashmere blend. Perfect for winter.
careInstructions: Hand wash with cold water. Reshape and lay flat to dry.

name: Summer Dress
description: A lightweight, sleeveless dress with a vibrant print. Great for warm weather.
careInstructions: Machine wash cold on a delicate cycle. Hang to dry.

name: Cargo Shorts
description: Comfortable cargo shorts with multiple pockets, made for practicality and style.
careInstructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry low.

name: Leather Sneakers
description: Premium leather sneakers with a clean, minimalist design and cushioned sole.
careInstructions: Wipe with a damp cloth. Use a leather cleaner as needed.

name: Winter Coat
description: A long, insulated coat with a faux fur-lined hood to keep you warm in cold climates.
careInstructions: Dry clean only. Do not machine wash.

name: Formal Shirt
description: A crisp white formal shirt made from 100% premium cotton, perfect for business and events.
careInstructions: Machine wash warm. Tumble dry on low. Iron while slightly damp for best results.

name: Maxi Dress
description: A flowing maxi dress with an elegant silhouette and a subtle side slit.
careInstructions: Hand wash with cold water. Hang to dry.

name: Sports Shorts
description: Lightweight and breathable sports shorts, ideal for gym workouts or running.
careInstructions: Machine wash cold. Do not use fabric softener. Tumble dry low.

name: Tote Bag
description: A durable canvas tote bag with leather handles, perfect for everyday use.
careInstructions: Spot clean with a damp cloth. Do not machine wash.
